kiln — terminal

$ kiln fire

> selecting template

Fire your SaaS.
Ship in 30 minutes.

Pick a template. Add your API keys. We deploy, wire, and fire your monetized SaaS — auth, billing, email, all of it.

Start for free →See how it works

Three steps. Live SaaS.

No YAML. No glue code. No stitching integrations for two weeks. Just build.

01

Pick a template

Choose from SaaS Starter, API Only, Agent Panel, Blog + CMS, Marketplace, or Dashboard. Each is a complete, deployable Next.js project wired for production.

02

Configure your keys

Add your Resend, Polar.sh, Trigger.dev, and Fly.io credentials. We verify everything before we fire — no half-baked deploys.

03

Fire the kiln

We spin up your app on Fly.io, wire all your keys, run migrations, and send you a live URL — typically under 3 minutes.

Everything wired. Nothing missing.

The integrations you actually need — all working on day one.

Auth

Better Auth with email, GitHub OAuth, sessions

Database

Drizzle ORM + SQLite (or swap to Postgres)

Email

Resend + React Email templates, real sends

Payments

Polar.sh checkout, webhooks, subscription mgmt

Jobs

Trigger.dev background tasks, scheduled events

Analytics

PostHog wired — events, sessions, feature flags

Deploy

Your own Fly.io app, your own domain, your data

Mobile

Expo scaffold included, same API backend

Simple pricing.

No surprise overages. No per-seat outrage.

Starter

Free

For trying it out.

  • ✓ 1 deployment
  • ✓ 100 emails/mo
  • ✓ 1 webhook
  • ✓ Community support

For makers who ship.
